query:
UPDATE skills SET name = ?1, description = ?2, type = ?3, version = ?4,
                 engines = ?5, tags = ?6, trigger = ?7, check_prompt = ?8, file_patterns = ?9,
                 enabled_for_codex = 1, enabled_for_claude = 1,
                 enabled_for_gemini = 1, enabled_for_cursor = 1,
                 updated_at = ?10
                 WHERE id = ?11
